retry_reason: If tp_vars is non-NULL, kref_put always decrements the refcount; retrying would cause a double-put (use-after-free risk). If NULL, there is nothing to do.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference on a batadv_tp_vars object. When the last reference is dropped, batadv_tp_vars_release is called to free the object. The caller must not access the object after this call, as it may have been freed. If tp_vars is NULL, the function is a no-op. No return value to check; this is the standard way to decrement the reference count for batadv_tp_vars.
